title: Fix remaining COBAD references to COBAT

requirements.summary: Replace all instances of 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35' throughout the frontend codebase to ensure brand consistency
acceptanceCriteria: All visible text displays 'COBAT 35' instead of 'COBAD 35'
HTML title and meta tags use 'COBAT 35'
No instances of 'COBAD' remain in user-facing text
Spanish text maintains correct grammar and orthography with the new name

file_operations.description: Update the HTML title tag and any meta description tags to replace 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35'
Search and replace all text content containing 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35' in section headings, card titles, and descriptions
Update all instances of 'COBAD 35' to 'COBAT 35' in the hero heading, subheading, and any call-to-action button text
Replace 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35' in form title, labels, placeholder text, validation messages, and success message content
Update all text containing 'COBAD 35' to 'COBAT 35' in form title, field labels, and success message branding
Replace 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35' in the section title and any descriptive text related to the school location
Update all footer text content from 'COBAD 35' to 'COBAT 35', including school name, copyright notices, and any contact information labels
Review and replace any instances of 'COBAD 35' with 'COBAT 35' in component props, configuration, or metadata passed to child components
